---
name: Bug report
about: Create a report to help us improve TomodachiDrawer
title: ''
labels: bug
assignees: ''

---

**Describe the bug**
A clear and concise description of what the bug is.

**To Reproduce**
Steps to reproduce the behaviour:
1. Go to '...'
2. Click on '....'
3. Scroll down to '....'
4. See error

**Expected behaviour**
A clear and concise description of what you expected to happen.

**Images**
If applicable, add screenshots to help explain your problem. If a drawing is messing up a way, also include your image you are drawing if possible.

Have you ensured you have flashed the latest base firmware?: Yes/No

**Setup (please complete the following information):**
 - OS: [e.g. Windows/Mac/Linux
 - Switch Version: [e.g. Switch Lite, Switch 1, Switch 2]
 - Version: [e.g 0.1.2]
- Microcontroller model: [e.g RP2040-Zero, RP2350-Zero, Raspberry Pi Pico, Pico 2, Pico 2W, Bootleg Pico with USB C, etc]


**Additional context**
Add any other context about the problem here.
